mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, due_at NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_item (user_id, title, description, due_at, remind_at, status, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueAt}, #{remindAt}, #{status}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE todo_item SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, due_at = #{dueAt}, remind_at = #{remindAt}, status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND status != 'COMPLETED' AND remind_at IS NOT NULL AND remind_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND status != 'COMPLETED'

SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY similarity(title, #{keyword}) DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
